subcodes.first_line: O thou who holdest fast to the hem of the exalted grandeur! Some time hath passed since Jináb-i-Áqá Muhammad-'Alí arrived in this sacred land [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای متمسک بذیل کبریاء جناب آقا محمد علی چندی بود که باین ارض مقدس وارد و
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @characteristics and conduct of true believers
